violations.text: The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Dishwasher was taken out of service at time of inspection. Utensils are brought back to catering company, single service items to be used until dishwasher is serviced and dispensing proper concentration. Proof of repairs to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2026
